commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=86ae758484337879300d64d7837a22dd352f3846)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes Discord ACP route binding handling, ACP dispatch cleanup/error suppression for acpx code-1 failures, and ACPX wrapper/lease diagnostics with focused tests.

PR surface: Source +120, Tests +116. Total +236 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main keeps ACP session-key bindings as explicit Discord route bindings, and a config with `plugins.allow` excluding `acpx` is documented as blocking the ACPX backend. I did not run a live Discord repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The next action is contributor or maintainer follow-up: fix the policy/message findings and provide live Discord proof, which an automated repair lane cannot supply for the external deployment.

target.title: Fix stale Discord ACP binding recovery
target.body:
## Summary
- ignore Discord ACP session bindings when ACP/ACP dispatch/acpx is disabled so stale ACP routes cannot override the configured native Discord route
- unbind recoverable ACP conversation bindings when acpx exits with code 1 and show a more actionable next step instead of the generic ACP_TURN_FAILED retry hint
- add ACPX launch/child-exit diagnostics with lease id, command hash, cwd, PID, exit code/signal, and stderr log path without logging secrets

## Root cause
Discord conversation bindings treated ACP session keys as explicit focus bindings forever. After ACP/acpx was disabled, stale ACP bindings and stale open process leases survived from earlier runs, so Discord could continue routing turns through an ACP session even though the live gateway was configured for native Codex and no acpx plugin was loaded. The resulting recoverable acpx code-1 failures were surfaced as repeated generic ACP_TURN_FAILED messages instead of clearing the stale binding.

## Tests
- pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-discord.config.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/route-resolution.test.ts
- env -u CODEX_HOME pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-acpx.config.ts extensions/acpx/src/codex-auth-bridge.test.ts extensions/acpx/src/runtime.test.ts extensions/acpx/src/process-lease.test.ts
- pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit.config.ts packages/acp-core/src/runtime/error-text.test.ts
- pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.auto-reply-reply.config.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts

Do not merge until verified against a live Discord turn on the affected deployment.
